---
title: "Documents"
---

## Slides

[View slides in full screen](1-2-documents.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="1-2-documents.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #123233;"></iframe>
```

## Exercises

Participants will use the following exercises during the live session. Every students receives a copy of the exercise files as a GitHub repository, which they can edit and run in their own Posit Cloud workspace. 

-   <a href="{{< var resources.exercises-raw >}}/hello-penguins.qmd">{{< fa download >}} `hello-penguins.qmd`</i></a>

-   <a href="{{< var resources.exercises-raw >}}/markdown-syntax.qmd">{{< fa download >}} `markdown-syntax.qmd`</i></a>

-   <a href="{{< var resources.exercises-raw >}}/citations.qmd">{{< fa download >}} `citations.qmd`</i></a>

-   <a href="{{< var resources.exercises-raw >}}/tables-figures.qmd">{{< fa download >}} `tables-figures.qmd`</i></a>

    -   <a href="{{< var resources.exercises-repo >}}/blob/main/images/quarto-logo.png?raw=true">{{< fa download >}} `quarto-logo.png`</i></a>
